Operation 'listPromos' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too minimal and lacks context about what promotional items are in the ComicVine domain, what parameters are available, and what data is returned. Enhanced version explains the domain context (ComicVine promotional content), mentions pagination support, and clarifies the type of data returned to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_summary: List promotional items
data.current_description: Returns a paginated list of promotional items.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve paginated list of promotional items
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of promotional items from the ComicVine database. Supports filtering and sorting through query parameters. Returns promotional item objects with details such as title, description, associated media, and publication dates. Use pagination parameters to control result set size and offset.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal and lacks context about what promotional items are in the ComicVine domain, what parameters are available, and what data is returned. Enhanced version explains the domain context (ComicVine promotional content), mentions pagination support, and clarifies the type of data returned to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getSeries' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. The summary is clear and actionable. data.current_summary: Get a single TV series by ID
data.current_description: Returns detailed information about a specific TV series.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive information about a specific TV series by its ID. Returns series details including title, description, publisher, episodes, and related metadata. Requires a valid series ID parameter.
data.reasoning: The summary is clear and actionable. The description is too generic and lacks specificity about what fields are returned and what parameters are required. Enhanced description clarifies the return structure and input requirements for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'listEpisodes' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. data.current_summary: List TV episodes

data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks critical details about filtering options, pagination parameters, and what fields are included in the response. Enhanced description provides AI agents with better understanding of available filters and pagination mechanisms.

data.current_summary: List story arcs
data.current_description: Returns a paginated list of story arcs.
